$description: Adrian Milsap hirobius design tokens - W3C DTCG 2025.10 compliant, Figma SDS architecture

stone.$description: Warm stone/brown palette for Concrete Creations brand accent ramp. PLACEHOLDER values pending final brand identity work.

100.$description: Stone 100 — near-white warm tint; accent-subtle surface.

400.$description: Stone 400 — light warm tone; dark-mode pressed accent.

450.$description: Stone 450 — medium warm tone; dark-mode hover accent.

500.$description: Stone 500 — mid warm tone; dark-mode rest accent.

600.$description: Stone 600 — primary warm stone; light-mode rest accent and CTA surface.

700.$description: Stone 700 — darker warm stone; light-mode hover accent.

800.$description: Stone 800 — deep warm stone; light-mode pressed accent.

950.$description: Stone 950 — near-black warm tone; dark-mode subtle accent surface.

100.$description: Light support tone for the Microsoft Game Dev project brand.

500.$description: Primary accent tone for the Microsoft Game Dev project brand.

900.$description: Dark support tone for the Microsoft Game Dev project brand.

microsoftGameDev.$description: Project-specific brand colors used in portfolio contexts.

projectBrand.$description: Project-specific brand color families reserved for portfolio surfaces.

space.$description: Dimensional increments within the 4px base-unit spatial system.

16.$description: Fullscreen backdrop blur for portfolio lightbox overlays.

blur.$description: Backdrop blur strengths for frosted overlays and fullscreen media treatments.

primary.$description: Self-hosted Satoshi (ITF) body typeface; falls back to system-ui sans-serif stack.

display.$description: Display face: Clash Display ITF, bound to display/h1/h2/h3 composites.

mono.$description: Monospace face: Geist Mono. Falls back to Courier New, monospace.

7xl.$description: Swiss-canon display size. Static desktop value; fluid in theme.css.

light.$description: Swiss-canon heading weight. Display and h1/h2 composites only.

snug.$description: Swiss-canon snug rhythm (10t-5). Used by h2/h3 composites for tight-but-readable heading lines.

relaxed.$description: Swiss-canon relaxed rhythm (10t-5). Used by body/small/mono composites for long-form prose comfort.

caps.$description: All-caps tracking for eyebrow / kicker labels. Always pairs with text-transform: uppercase.

instant.$description: Fixed elapsed time interval in milliseconds.

short.$description: Fixed elapsed time interval in milliseconds.

medium.$description: Fixed elapsed time interval in milliseconds.

long.$description: Fixed elapsed time interval in milliseconds.

emphasized.$description: Cubic bezier with balanced input and output tangents.

decelerate.$description: Cubic bezier with steep initial gain and constrained tail velocity.

accelerate.$description: Cubic bezier with restrained initial gain and steep terminal velocity.

elastic.$description: Spring response defined by stiffness, damping, and mass parameters.

color.$description: HSL channels for shadow-color alpha compositing. Light: cool neutral; dark: black.

breakpoint.$description: Discrete viewport thresholds expressed as dimensions.

zIndex.$description: Discrete stacking levels along the z axis.

productive.$description: For micro-interactions and status changes. No deformation.

expressive.$description: For teaching moments and significant UI entries. Includes physics-based squish.

spatial.$description: For elements traveling long distances across the viewport.

exit.$description: For elements being removed from the DOM.

accentSubtle.$description: Faint accent tint for hover states or highlights

subtle.$description: Lowest-contrast border for resting hairline edges on flat surfaces.

space.$description: Semantic spacing tiers: subgrid, component, layout, section.

xs.$description: 2px vertical rhythm nudge and baseline adjustment.

gap.$description: 8px label↔input rhythm and closely coupled control spacing.

medium.$description: 12px adjacent form fields and medium intra-component gaps.

padding.$description: 24px default inset for cards, forms, panels, and grouped surfaces.

tight.$description: 16px default HdsStack gap and inter-component spacing.

normal.$description: 24px column gutters and sidebar gutter spacing.

gutter.$description: 24px column and region gutters (alias for layout.normal).

inset.$description: 32px major block separation and inset inter-component gaps.

spacious.$description: 48px section break and whitespace separator between major content blocks.

stack.$description: 80px vertical rhythm between page sections and major editorial blocks.

heroMax.$description: 128px maximum hero region padding for extra-large displays.

indent.$description: 12px indent level for nested sidebar and TOC groups.

gap.$description: 16px vertical spacing between items in sidebar and TOC stacks.

sectionGap.$description: 12px spacing between sidebar sections and grouped rail blocks.

railPadding.$description: 20px outer padding for sidebar and TOC rails.

content.$description: Max width for prose/content (760px). Use with HdsContainer for centered text blocks.

max.$description: Max width for full-layout containers (1200px). Use with HdsContainer for page layouts.

typography.$description: 8-style Swiss-canon type ramp: display, h1–h3, body, small, caption, mono.

com.figma.variables.note: Figma stores the 72px desktop-max static value. Browser CSS overrides with fluid scaling (40px min → 72px max). See src/styles/theme.css.

h1.$description: Primary section headings (h1). 48px / Clash Display medium 500 / leading-tight.

com.figma.variables.note: Figma stores the 48px desktop-max static value. Browser CSS overrides with fluid scaling (32px min → 48px max). See src/styles/theme.css.

h2.$description: Secondary section headings (h2). Clash Display medium, 30px, line-height 42px.

com.figma.variables.note: Figma stores the 30px desktop-max static value. Browser CSS overrides with fluid scaling (24px min → 30px max). See src/styles/theme.css.

h3.$description: Component and card headers (h3). 20px / Clash Display medium 500 / leading-snug.

com.figma.variables.note: Figma stores the 20px desktop-max static value. Browser CSS overrides with fluid scaling (18px min → 20px max). See src/styles/theme.css.

body.$description: Body prose. Satoshi medium, 17px, line-height 28px, max 60ch measure.

ui.$description: UI text for nav, labels, captions. Satoshi medium, 15px, line-height 24px.

eyebrow.$description: Eyebrow / kicker label. Satoshi medium, 13px, caps tracking, uppercase.

mono.$description: Monospace for code, token names, shortcuts. Geist Mono regular, 13px.

none.$description: Semantic alias for leading-none (1). Display text and badge spans.

docs.$description: Doc-page spacing scale: section, paragraph, inline rhythm.

section.$description: 48px between H2 sections — generous section break for doc pages.

paragraph.$description: 24px between paragraphs — comfortable prose rhythm for long-form doc content.

inline.$description: 8px inline cluster spacing — gap between metadata badges, inline icons, doc-page chips.

rest.$description: Default accent fill for interactive elements at rest.

inactive.$description: Accent fill for inactive or unselected accent elements.

disabled.$description: Accent fill for disabled accent elements.

content.$description: Text and icon color on neutral surfaces with accent intent.

contentHover.$description: Accent content color on pointer hover.

subtle.$description: Low-emphasis accent tint for hover backgrounds and selection highlights.

action.$description: Corner radius for interactive action elements like buttons and inputs.

default.$description: Default hairline border weight for surfaces and inputs.

emphasis.$description: Stronger border weight for focus rings and active indicators.

subtle.$description: Resting elevation shadow for raised surfaces (cards, inline panels).

floating.$description: Hover/floating elevation for menus, popovers, and tooltips.

flat.$description: Flat surface (no shadow, hairline border) for embedded panels.

bgActive.$description: Nav item background fill when active or selected.

borderActive.$description: Nav item border color when active or selected.

text.$description: Nav item text color at rest.

textActive.$description: Nav item text color when active or selected.

radius.$description: Pill radius for the tag surface.

activeText.$description: Text color when the tag is active.

blur.$description: Backdrop blur applied behind fullscreen image lightboxes.

role.$description: Shadcn-style role aliases mapping to semantic tokens. Compiled to --role-* CSS vars.

foreground.$description: Default text on background. shadcn role: foreground.

card-foreground.$description: Text on card. shadcn role: card-foreground.

popover-foreground.$description: Text on popover. shadcn role: popover-foreground.

primary.$description: Primary action surface. shadcn role: primary.

primary-foreground.$description: Text/icons on primary surface. shadcn role: primary-foreground.

secondary.$description: Secondary action surface. shadcn role: secondary.

secondary-foreground.$description: Text on secondary surface. shadcn role: secondary-foreground.

muted.$description: Muted/quiet bg (skeletons, disabled inputs). shadcn role: muted.

accent.$description: Hover/active tinted bg. shadcn role: accent.

accent-foreground.$description: Text on accent surface. shadcn role: accent-foreground.

destructive.$description: Destructive action surface. shadcn role: destructive.

destructive-foreground.$description: Text on destructive surface. shadcn role: destructive-foreground.

input.$description: Input field border. shadcn role: input.

ring.$description: Focus ring color. shadcn role: ring.

radius.$description: Default border radius. shadcn role: radius.
